subcodes.first_line: We have verily sent unto thee a remembrance from Our presence, when the Trusted One turned towards the Land of Tá by God's leave, the Sovereign Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلنا الیک ذکرا من عندنا اذ توجه الامین الی ارض التاء باذن الله مالک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
